0x0000001e.name: KMODE_EXCEPTION_NOT_HANDLED
0x0000001e.title: Kmode Exception Not Handled
0x0000001e.detail: Stop code 0X0000001E — KMODE_EXCEPTION_NOT_HANDLED. This is a Windows kernel bugcheck. Check the faulty driver in the crash details above for root cause.
0x0000001e.action: Run: windbg -z <minidump> to analyse. Check Driver Manager tab for updates to the faulty driver.
